scene_notes: Central column rebuilt from a real imported NIH3D lumbar vertebra asset, duplicated into a full vertical spine rather than modeled from primitive shapes.
Dense cyan, magenta, blue, and green particle cloud surrounds the central column.
Dark cinematic web-hero composition with reflective highlights and subtle UI text hints.
Latest revision restores the older successful technique: one anatomical vertebra object imported, transformed, multiplied, and styled as wet iridescent black metal.
Color pass tuned toward the reference: darker oil-slick metal base, cyan/blue highlights, magenta surface accents, and green lower particle glow.
Added one large foreground project card using a cropped texture from the supplied screenshot: assets/reference_card_sustainable_horizons.png.
